hero.headline: Hire Smarter. Apply Faster.
hero.subheadline: AI-powered platform connecting top talent with forward-thinking companies. Find your dream job or hire the perfect candidate  all in one place.

features.heading: Everything You Need to Hire Better

1.title: AI Job Description Generator
1.description: Generate tailored, high-quality job descriptions in seconds. Just enter a few keywords and let AI craft the perfect JD for any role.
details: Generate complete JDs from job title or keywords
Customize tone, seniority, and required skills
Export in multiple formats or post directly

2.title: Smart Job Posting & CV Evaluation
2.description: Post jobs instantly and let AI automatically screen and score incoming CVs against your requirements.
details: Auto-parse and extract key candidate data from CVs
AI match scoring against job requirements
Instant shortlist generation for top candidates

3.title: AI Interviews & Assessments
3.description: Conduct comprehensive assessments with video, text, code, and multiple-choice questions powered by AI.
details: Video interview with AI analysis of responses
Live coding challenges with real-time evaluation

4.title: Visual Candidates Pipeline
4.description: Track every candidate through your hiring stages with a drag-and-drop pipeline that gives you full visibility.
details: Custom pipeline stages for any workflow
Real-time stage progress and status indicators

5.title: Detailed Candidate Profiles
5.description: Deep-dive into every candidate with AI-generated feedback showing strengths, weaknesses, gaps, and question-level analysis.
details: Full AI evaluation report with scored dimensions
Strengths, weaknesses, and skill gap analysis

6.title: Applicant Feedback Engine
6.description: Help every applicant grow with personalized feedback after rejection or offer, turning every application into a learning experience.
details: Personalized improvement tips based on performance
Skill gap analysis with actionable recommendations

0.title: AI-Powered Resume Review

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Have questions about how HireReadyAI works? Here are the ones we hear most.

0.q: How can I find jobs on HireReadyAI?
0.a: Use the Jobs page to search by title, skill, or company. You can filter by job type, location, and salary range. Your dashboard also surfaces recommended roles based on your profile , the more complete your profile, the better the suggestions.

1.q: Is my resume and profile data kept private?
1.a: Yes. Your profile is only shared with employers when you explicitly apply. We never sell your data or surface your profile to recruiters without your consent.

2.q: How do I track my applications?
2.a: The My Applications dashboard gives you a real-time pipeline view , from Applied through Screening, Interview, Assessment, and Final Stage. Each card updates automatically when a recruiter takes action.

3.q: Can I take interviews directly on the platform?
3.a: Yes. HireReadyAI lets you start live AI-powered interviews instantly. You don't need to prepare externally , just choose a role and begin. The AI asks role-specific questions, evaluates your responses in real time, and provides feedback on your answers.

4.q: What types of roles and industries does HireReadyAI cover?
4.a: We cover tech, design, product, marketing, finance, and operations roles across startups, scale-ups, and enterprise companies. New listings are added daily, and you can set alerts for any keyword or company.

5.q: How do I upload or update my profile picture?
5.a: Go to your Profile page, click on your avatar, and select a new image from your device. Supported formats are JPG and PNG. Your picture is visible to employers when they review your application.
